zh.lifeSummary: 當Giles Bassingbourne於1303年出生在英國奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德時，他的父親Humphrey Bassingbourne III28歲，母親Lady Alice Benefield21歲。他於1319年與Alice Elena Langley在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1338年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾阿炳頓享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Giles Bassingbourne于1303年出生在英国奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德时，他的父亲Humphrey Bassingbourne III28岁，母亲Lady Alice Benefield21岁。他于1319年与Alice Elena Langley在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1338年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾阿炳頓享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Giles Bassingbourne was born in 1303, in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Humphrey Bassingbourne III, was 28 and his mother, Lady Alice Benefield, was 21. He married Alice Elena Langley in 1319, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1338, in Abington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giles Bassingbourne est né en 1303, à Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Bassingbourne III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Benefield, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice Elena Langley en 1319, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1338, à Abington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

Er hat 1319 in England, United Kingdom Alice Elena Langley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1338 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Abington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Alice Elena Langley nel 1319, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1338, nel Abington, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Giles Bassingbourneが1303年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイプトン-ウンデル-ウイチウッドで生まれた時，父Humphrey Bassingbourne IIIは28歳，母Lady Alice Benefieldは21歳であった。1319年にイギリスイギリスでAlice Elena Langleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1338年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアアビントンで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Giles Bassingbourne(이)가 1303년 영국 스퍼드실르 시프토-운더-w이ch우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Bassingbourne III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Benefield(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1319년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alice Elena Langley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1338년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 압잉턴에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giles Bassingbourne родился в 1303 г. в местности шиптон-ундир-вичвуд, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey Bassingbourne III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Benefield, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Elena Langley в 1319 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1338 г. в местности абингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.
